member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.AuthController.Login(Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Dtos.UserDtos.LoginDto)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token if successful.
member.param: The login credentials (username/email and password).
member.returns: JWT token string if login succeeds.
member.response: Login successful, returns JWT token.
Unauthorized, credentials are invalid.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.AuthController.Register(Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Dtos.UserDtos.UserDto)
member.summary: Registers a new user.
member.param: The user data for registration.
member.returns: The registered user data if successful.
member.response: User registered successfully.
Returned when registration fails (e.g., username/email already exists).

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.CategoriesController.GetAllCategories
member.summary: Retrieves all categories.
member.returns: List of categories with full image URLs.
member.response: Returns the list of categories successfully.
Returned when an error occurs while fetching categories.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.CategoriesController.GetCategoryById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a category by its ID.
member.param: The ID of the category.
member.returns: Category data including full image URL.
member.response: Category retrieved successfully.
Returned when the category does not exist.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.CategoriesController.AddNewCategory(Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Dtos.CategoriesDtos.CreateCategoryDto)
member.summary: Adds a new category.
member.param: Category data including name and image.
member.returns: The newly created category data.
member.response: Category created successfully.
Returned when the category could not be created.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.CategoriesController.UpdateCategory(Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Dtos.CategoriesDtos.UpdateCategoryDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing category.
member.param: The updated category data.
member.returns: The updated category data.
member.response: Category updated successfully.
Returned when the update fails.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.CategoriesController.DeleteCategory(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a category by its ID.
member.param: The ID of the category to delete.
member.returns: Boolean indicating success of deletion.
member.response: Category deleted successfully.
Returned when deletion fails.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.CropsController.GetAllCrops
member.summary: Retrieves all crops from the database. Returns a list of crops with detailed information including category and owner.
member.returns: Returns containing a list of . If no crops are found, returns an empty list.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.CropsController.GetAllCropsByUserId(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all crops for a specific user based on their OwnerId.
member.param: The ID of the user whose crops are being retrieved.
member.returns: Returns containing a list of belonging to the specified user. Returns an empty list if the user has no crops.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.CropsController.GetAllCropsByCategoryId(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves crops by their category ID.
member.param: The ID of the category.
member.returns: Returns containing a list of in the specified category. Returns an empty list if no crops exist in this category.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.CropsController.GetAllCropsByName(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves crops by their name (partial or full match).
member.param: The name of the crop to search for.
member.returns: Returns containing a list of matching the name. Returns an empty list if no crops match.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.CropsController.GetCropById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a crop by its unique identifier.
member.param: The unique ID of the crop.
member.returns: Returns containing the if found. Returns if the crop does not exist.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.CropsController.AddNewCrop(Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Dtos.CropsDtos.CreateCropDto)
member.summary: Creates a new crop and stores it in the database. Returns a 201 Created response with the location of the newly created crop.
member.param:
The data transfer object containing the crop details:
Name: The name of the crop.
CategoryId: The ID of the crop category.
OwnerId: The ID of the user who owns the crop.
ImagePath: Optional image file for the crop.
member.returns: Returns with the newly created crop data and a link to . Returns if creation fails.
member.remarks: Example request: POST /api/crops FormData: - Name: "Tomato" - CategoryId: 1 - OwnerId: 5 - ImagePath: file (optional)

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.CropsController.UpdateCrop(Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Dtos.CropsDtos.UpdateCropDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing crop in the database. Returns a 200 OK response with the updated crop data.
member.param:
The data transfer object containing the updated crop details:
Id: The unique identifier of the crop to be updated.
Name: The updated name of the crop.
CategoryId: The updated category ID of the crop.
OwnerId: The ID of the user who owns the crop.
ImagePath: Optional new image file for the crop.
member.returns: Returns with the updated crop data if the update succeeds. Returns if the crop with the specified Id does not exist. Returns if the update fails due to validation or other issues.
member.remarks: Example request: PUT /api/crops FormData: - Id: 10 - Name: "Updated Tomato" - CategoryId: 1 - OwnerId: 5 - ImagePath: file (optional)

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.CropsController.DeleteCrop(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a crop from the database by its unique identifier.
member.param: The unique ID of the crop to be deleted.
member.returns: Returns (204) if deletion succeeds. Returns (404) if the crop does not exist. Returns (400) if deletion fails due to constraints or other errors.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.FarmerOrdersController.GetMyOrders(Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Enums.ItemStatus)
member.summary: Retrieves all orders placed by a specific user.
member.param: The ID of the user whose orders are being fetched.
member.returns: A list of orders belonging to the specified user.
member.response: List of user orders retrieved successfully.
Server error while fetching the user's orders.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.NotificationsController.GetUserNotifications(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all notifications for a specific user.
member.param: The unique identifier of the user.
member.returns: A list of notifications for the user.
member.response: Returns the list of notifications.
If no notifications are found for the user.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.NotificationsController.SendNotification(Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Dtos.Notifications.CreateNotificationDto)
member.summary: Sends a new notification to a user.
member.param: The notification data to be sent.
member.returns: The created notification details.
member.response: Returns the created notification.
If the request data is invalid or sending fails.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.NotificationsController.MarkAsRead(System.Int32)
member.summary: Marks a notification as read.
member.param: The unique identifier of the notification.
member.returns: A message indicating the operation result.
member.response: If the notification was successfully marked as read.
If the notification is not found.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.PaymentsController.CreatePayment(Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Dtos.PaymentsDtos.PaymentRequestDto)
member.summary: Creates a new payment.
member.param: The payment request data.
member.returns: The details of the created payment.
member.response: Payment created successfully.
Invalid payment data or creation failed.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.PaymentsController.GetPaymentById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a payment by its ID.
member.param: The unique payment ID.
member.returns: The payment details if found.
member.response: Payment found and returned successfully.
Payment with the specified ID not found.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.PaymentsController.GetPaymentsByOrder(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all payments associated with a specific order.
member.param: The order ID to filter payments.
member.returns: A list of payments related to the specified order.
member.response: Payments retrieved successfully.
No payments found for the specified order.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.PaymentsController.UpdateStatus(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Updates the status of an existing payment.
member.param: The unique payment ID.
The new payment status. Allowed values: Paid, Pending, Failed.
Optional transaction ID for external payment gateways.
member.response: Payment status updated successfully.
Invalid status value provided.
Payment with the specified ID not found.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.ProductsController.GetAllProducts
member.summary: Retrieves all products available in the system.
member.remarks: This endpoint returns all products with their main images (if available). It constructs full image URLs dynamically based on the current request host.
member.response: Returns the list of products successfully.
Returned when no products were found.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.ProductsController.GetProducts(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Endpoint للزوار: جلب المنتجات بشكل Paginated مع تخزين مؤقت في المتصفح
member.param: رقم الصفحة المطلوبة (افتراضي = 1)
عدد المنتجات في كل صفحة (افتراضي = 20)
member.returns: PagedResult يحتوي على المنتجات، رقم الصفحة، حجم الصفحة، وعدد العناصر الكلي

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.ProductsController.GetAdminProducts(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Endpoint للمسؤول: جلب المنتجات بشكل Paginated بدون أي تخزين مؤقت
member.param: رقم الصفحة المطلوبة (افتراضي = 1)
عدد المنتجات في كل صفحة (افتراضي = 20)
member.returns: PagedResult يحتوي على المنتجات، رقم الصفحة، حجم الصفحة، وعدد العناصر الكلي

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.ProductsController.GetAllUserProducts(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.IAuthorizationService,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all products created by a specific user.
member.param: The Number of page.
The Number of Elements that you want.
The unique identifier of the user.
member.remarks: Use this endpoint to view all products uploaded by a specific user. The endpoint also attaches full image URLs for display purposes.
member.response: Returns the list of the user's products successfully.
Returned when the request parameters are invalid.
Returned when the user has no products.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.ProductsController.GetSearchSuggestions(System.String)
member.summary: Provides dynamic search suggestions for product names based on user input.
member.param: The partial search term entered by the user (e.g., "tom" → "Tomato").
member.remarks: This endpoint is designed to enhance the user experience by offering real-time search suggestions while the user types in the search box. The search is case-insensitive and limited to the top 10 matching product names.
member.response: Returns a list of matching product names successfully.
Returned when the query string is null or empty.
Returned when no product suggestions are found.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.ProductsController.AddNewProducts(Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Dtos.Products.ProductToCreate,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.IAuthorizationService)
member.summary: Adds a new product to the system.
member.param: The product details to create.
member.remarks: This endpoint allows you to add a new product, including uploading product images. The images should be provided using a multipart/form-data request.
member.response: Returned when the product is created successfully.
Returned when the product creation fails due to validation or internal issues.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.ProductsController.GetProductById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a product by its unique identifier (Id).
member.param: The unique identifier of the product.
member.returns: Returns the product data including images (with full URLs) if found.
member.response: Returns the product details successfully.
Returned when the product with the specified Id does not exist.
Returned when the request is invalid.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.ProductsController.GetByName(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a product by its name.
member.param: The name of the product to search for.
member.returns: Returns the product data including images (with full URLs) if found.
member.response: Returns the product details successfully.
Returned when no product with the specified name is found.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.ProductsController.Update(Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Dtos.Products.ProductToUpdate,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.IAuthorizationService)
member.summary: Updates an existing product.
member.param: The updated product data including images.
member.returns: Returns the updated product data with full image URLs if successful.
member.response: Product updated successfully.
Returned when validation fails or update fails.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.ProductsController.Delete(System.Int32,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.IAuthorizationService)
member.summary: Deletes a product by its unique identifier.
member.param: The ID of the product to delete.
member.returns: Returns a boolean indicating whether the deletion was successful.
member.response: Product deleted successfully.
Returned when the product with the specified ID does not exist.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.ProductsController.UpdateStatus(System.Int32,Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Enums.enProductStatus)
member.summary: Update the status of a product (e.g., Approve, Reject, Pending). Only admins can perform this action. 1- Pending 2-Approved 3- Rejected
member.param: Product ID.
New product status.
member.returns: Result of the update operation.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.UsersController.GetAllUsers
member.summary: Retrieves all users in the system.
member.remarks: Requires authorization. Optionally, can restrict access to Admin roles using [Role("Admin")]. Each user's image URL is converted to a full URL.
member.returns: A list of users.
member.response: Returns the list of users.
Returned when an error occurs while fetching users.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.UsersController.GetUserById(System.Int32,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.IAuthorizationService)
member.summary: Retrieves a user by their unique identifier.
member.param: The unique identifier of the user.
member.returns: The user data including the full image URL.
member.response: Returns the user data successfully.
Returned when the user does not exist or another error occurs.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.UsersController.UpdateUser(Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Dtos.UserDtos.UserUpdateDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing user's information.
member.param: The updated user data.
member.returns: The updated user information.
member.response: User updated successfully.
Returned when the update fails due to invalid data or other issues.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.UsersController.DeleteUser(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a user by their unique identifier.
member.param: The ID of the user to delete.
member.returns: Boolean indicating success of deletion.
member.response: User deleted successfully.
Returned when deletion fails due to invalid request.
Returned when the user does not exist.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV.Controllers.v1.UsersController.SetUserAccountStatus(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the status of a user account (activate or deactivate).
member.remarks: Only an Admin can perform this action. Use as true to activate the account, false to deactivate.
member.param: The ID of the user whose account status will be updated.
The desired account status (true = active, false = inactive).
member.returns: Returns indicating success or failure of the operation. HTTP 200 OK if successful, 400 Bad Request if the operation fails, 404 Not Found if the user does not exist.

member.name: T:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.OrdersController
member.summary: Responsible for handling order-related operations such as creating orders, retrieving specific order details, and listing user orders.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.OrdersController.#ctor(Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Interfaces.IOrderService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.OrdersController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Service responsible for managing order logic.
Logger instance for capturing logs and diagnostics.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.OrdersController.CreateOrder(Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Dtos.OrdersDtos.OrderRequestDto)
member.summary: Creates a new order for the user.
member.param: Order details including items, user ID, and payment information.
member.returns: Returns the created order if successful, or a validation/error message if something went wrong.
member.response: Order created successfully.
Invalid input data or validation error.
Server error while processing the order.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.OrdersController.GetOrderById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves details of a specific order by its ID.
member.param: The unique identifier of the order.
member.returns: Returns the order details if found, or 404 if not found.
member.response: Order found successfully.
Order with the given ID not found.
Server error while retrieving the order.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.OrdersController.CanceledOrder(System.Int32,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.IAuthorizationService)
member.summary: Retrieves details of a specific order by its ID.
member.param: The unique identifier of the order.
member.returns: Returns the order details if found, or 404 if not found.
member.response: Order found successfully.
Order with the given ID not found.
Server error while retrieving the order.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.OrdersController.GetUserOrders(Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Enums.OrderStatus,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.IAuthorizationService)
member.summary: Retrieves all orders placed by a specific user.
member.param: The ID of the user whose orders are being fetched.
member.returns: A list of orders belonging to the specified user.
member.response: List of user orders retrieved successfully.
Server error while fetching the user's orders.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.ProductImagesController.GetImages(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all images for a specific product.
member.param: The ID of the product.
member.returns: A list of images associated with the product.
member.response: Images retrieved successfully.
No images found for the specified product.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.ProductImagesController.UploadSingle(System.Int32,Agricultural_For_CV_Shared.Dtos.ProductsImages.UploadImageDto)
member.summary: Uploads a single image for a product.
member.param: The product ID.
The image file to upload.
Optional: the display order of the image.
member.returns: The uploaded image details.
member.response: Image uploaded successfully.
Failed to upload image due to invalid data.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.ProductImagesController.UploadMultiple(System.Int32,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile[])
member.summary: Uploads multiple images for a product at once.
member.param: The product ID.
The array of image files to upload.
member.returns: The details of all uploaded images.
member.response: Images uploaded successfully.
Failed to upload images due to invalid data.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.ProductImagesController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a specific image of a product.
member.param: The ID of the image to delete.
member.returns: Success or failure result of the deletion.
member.response: Image deleted successfully.
Image not found.

member.name: T:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.ReportsController
member.summary: Controller responsible for handling reporting operations for both Farmers and Admins. Implements high-performance data retrieval and structured logging.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.ReportsController.GetFarmerMonthlySales(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves the monthly financial and sales report for a specific farmer. Optimized with SARGable queries and Covering Indexes at the database level.
member.param: The unique identifier of the farmer.
The target year for the report.
The target month for the report.
member.returns: A detailed summary of revenue, commission, and items sold.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.ReportsController.GetTopFarmers(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves the top-performing farmers based on total revenue generated. Accessible by Admin users to monitor platform growth.
member.param: Number of top farmers to retrieve (Default is 5).
member.returns: A list of top farmers with their respective sales performance metrics.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.ReportsController.GetSalesGrowth
member.summary: Retrieves the Month-over-Month (MoM) sales growth analysis. Uses SQL Window Functions (LAG) for high-performance trend analysis.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.ReportsController.GetLowStockAlerts(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves products with low stock levels. Can be filtered by FarmerId or used by Admin to see all alerts.

member.name: M:Agricultural_For_CV_API.Controllers.ReportsController.GetCategoryAnalysis
member.summary: Provides a business intelligence (BI) report on sales distribution across different categories. Useful for Admin to identify the most profitable product categories.
member.returns: A list of categories with total revenue, units sold, and order counts.
